offer: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts. We provide data-driven forecasts instead of manual tracking and guesswork.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try Sales data analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
